# mxroute_reseller_user (Data Source)

Fetches a single reseller user by username. Requires reseller API access. For all users, use `mxroute_reseller_users`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_reseller_user" "example" {
  username = "acustomer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String) The username to look up.

### Read-Only

- `domain` (String) The primary domain associated with the user.
- `email` (String) The user's contact email address.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the username.
- `package` (String) The reseller package assigned to the user.
- `quota_limit` (Number) The user's storage quota limit in megabytes; null when unlimited.
- `quota_unlimited` (Boolean) Whether the user's quota is unlimited.
- `quota_used` (Number) Current storage usage in megabytes.
- `suspended` (Boolean) Whether the user is suspended.
